requirement_topic.en: Honduras OHN / CREE Market-Access and Conformity Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 洪都拉斯OHN / CREE市场准入与合格范围
requirement_topic.zht: 宏都拉斯OHN / CREE市場准入與合格範圍

summary.en: Honduras standards are handled through the Honduran standards system (OHN context), while electricity-sector regulation is handled by CREE and grid service is coordinated with ENEE or the relevant utility. A single official Honduras whole-unit mandatory EV charger certification route could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should therefore verify the HS code, importer obligations, electrical-product conformity route, telecom module approval if fitted, Spanish labelling, warranty/service obligations, CREE electricity-sector requirements, and ENEE interconnection requirements for the exact charger model and project.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯标准由洪都拉斯标准体系（OHN环境）处理，电力行业监管由CREE负责，电网服务需与ENEE或相关公用事业单位协调。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认洪都拉斯针对整机电动汽车充电桩的单一官方强制认证路径。因此，出口商应针对具体充电桩型号和项目核实HS编码、进口商义务、电气产品合格路径、如配无线模块则需的电信批准、西班牙语标签、质保/服务义务、CREE电力行业要求及ENEE并网要求。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯標準由宏都拉斯標準體系（OHN環境）處理，電力行業監管由CREE負責，電網服務需與ENEE或相關公用事業單位協調。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認宏都拉斯針對整機電動汽車充電樁的單一官方強制認證路徑。因此，出口商應針對具體充電樁型號和項目核實HS編碼、進口商義務、電氣產品合格路徑、如配無線模組則需的電信批准、西班牙語標籤、質保/服務義務、CREE電力行業要求及ENEE併網要求。

standards_or_laws: OHN Honduran standards context — verify adopted or referenced EVSE standards
CREE laws, regulations, technical standards and procedures
IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 evidence where adopted by project or conformity body

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and China domestic conformity routes where applicable. These documents may support technical review but do not establish Honduras import clearance, OHN acceptance, CREE approval, ENEE interconnection, or site-owner acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930直流通信及适用的中国国内合格路径准备文件。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能证明洪都拉斯进口清关、OHN接受、CREE批准、ENEE并网或场地方验收。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930直流通訊及適用的中國國內合格路徑準備文件。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能證明宏都拉斯進口清關、OHN接受、CREE批准、ENEE併網或場地方驗收。

standards_or_laws: China CCC or other China domestic conformity route where in scope

gap.en: Before claiming Honduras readiness, map the importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage and frequency, connector, radio functions, metering and payment functions, Spanish labels, installation manual, IEC safety and EMC reports, utility service application, and spare-part/service plan. Get written confirmation from the importer or local professional on the current OHN / CREE / ENEE path.
gap.zh: 在宣称满足洪都拉斯要求前，应映射进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压和频率、接口、无线功能、计量和支付功能、西班牙语标签、安装手册、IEC安全及EMC报告、公用事业服务申请，以及备件/服务计划。应由进口商或当地专业人士书面确认当前OHN / CREE / ENEE路径。
gap.zht: 在宣稱滿足宏都拉斯要求前，應映射進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓和頻率、接口、無線功能、計量和支付功能、西班牙語標籤、安裝手冊、IEC安全及EMC報告、公用事業服務申請，以及備件/服務計劃。應由進口商或當地專業人士書面確認當前OHN / CREE / ENEE路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact whole-unit EV charger certification route not confirmed; import, electrical safety, radio, utility, and project requirements may each apply depending on product configuration and site
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China domestic scope; China GB/T or CCC evidence is not a Honduras market-access substitute

source.publisher: CREE — Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Honduras market access from China GB/T or CCC evidence alone. Confirm the exact OHN / CREE / ENEE and import route for the charger model, HS code, connector, radio functions, and installation site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T或CCC证据宣称自动满足洪都拉斯市场准入。应针对充电桩型号、HS编码、接口、无线功能和安装地点确认准确的OHN / CREE / ENEE及进口路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T或CCC證據宣稱自動滿足宏都拉斯市場准入。應針對充電樁型號、HS編碼、接口、無線功能和安裝地點確認準確的OHN / CREE / ENEE及進口路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Honduras EV Market Context — Nascent Deployment and Utility Constraints
requirement_topic.zh: 洪都拉斯电动汽车市场背景——早期部署与公用事业约束
requirement_topic.zht: 宏都拉斯電動汽車市場背景——早期部署與公用事業約束

summary.en: Honduras EV charging deployment is still nascent, with early demand concentrated around Tegucigalpa, San Pedro Sula, fleets, hotels, retail sites, logistics users, and highway corridors. The public charging business case depends on imported vehicle mix, utility capacity, reliability, tariffs, site ownership, payment systems, and maintenance capability. ENEE grid constraints and the country's participation in the Central American interconnected system make load management, staged deployment, and site-specific utility review important for high-power chargers.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯电动汽车充电部署仍处于早期阶段，早期需求集中在特古西加尔巴、圣佩德罗苏拉、车队、酒店、零售场所、物流用户和公路走廊。公共充电商业可行性取决于进口车辆结构、公用事业容量、供电可靠性、电价、场地权属、支付系统和维护能力。ENEE电网约束及该国参与中美洲互联电力系统，使高功率充电桩尤其需要负载管理、分阶段部署和逐站公用事业审查。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯電動汽車充電部署仍處於早期階段，早期需求集中在特古西加爾巴、聖佩德羅蘇拉、車隊、酒店、零售場所、物流用戶和公路走廊。公共充電商業可行性取決於進口車輛結構、公用事業容量、供電可靠性、電價、場地權屬、支付系統和維護能力。ENEE電網約束及該國參與中美洲互聯電力系統，使高功率充電樁尤其需要負載管理、分階段部署和逐站公用事業審查。

standards_or_laws: CREE electricity-sector planning and tariff context
SIEPAC / Central American regional electricity interconnection context
Project-specific fleet, municipality, hotel, retail or logistics requirements

summary.en: China has mature domestic EV charging volumes, dense urban charging networks, and mature GB/T supply chains. Those home-market advantages help sourcing but do not remove Honduras requirements for 60 Hz design, local connector compatibility, Spanish documentation, local maintenance, utility capacity review, and project-specific payment or OCPP integration.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的国内电动汽车充电规模、密集城市充电网络和成熟GB/T供应链。这些国内市场优势有利于采购，但不能免除洪都拉斯对60 Hz设计、当地接口兼容性、西班牙语文件、本地维护、公用事业容量审查，以及项目特定支付或OCPP集成的要求。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的國內電動汽車充電規模、密集城市充電網絡和成熟GB/T供應鏈。這些國內市場優勢有利於採購，但不能免除宏都拉斯對60 Hz設計、當地接口兼容性、西班牙語文件、本地維護、公用事業容量審查，以及項目特定支付或OCPP集成的要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China local grid and charging-operator requirements

gap.en: Use Honduras market context to size risk: prioritize modular chargers, 60 Hz-compatible power electronics, load-management firmware, remote diagnostics, Spanish service materials, local spare parts, and written connector confirmation. Procurement opportunity should not be treated as conformity acceptance.
gap.zh: 应以洪都拉斯市场背景评估风险：优先考虑模块化充电桩、兼容60 Hz的电力电子、负载管理固件、远程诊断、西班牙语服务资料、本地备件和书面接口确认。采购机会不应被视为合格接受。
gap.zht: 應以宏都拉斯市場背景評估風險：優先考慮模組化充電樁、兼容60 Hz的電力電子、負載管理固件、遠程診斷、西班牙語服務資料、本地備件和書面接口確認。採購機會不應被視為合格接受。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; CREE, ENEE, import, utility, and site-owner requirements remain separate gates
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV scale does not affect Honduras conformity obligations

source.publisher: ENEE — Empresa Nacional de Energía Eléctrica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Honduras is an early EV charging market, so commercial success depends on conservative site selection, utility capacity confirmation, connector confirmation, and local service readiness. China domestic scale is useful but not a compliance shortcut.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 洪都拉斯是早期电动汽车充电市场，商业落地取决于保守选址、公用事业容量确认、接口确认和本地服务准备。中国国内规模有采购价值，但不是合规捷径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 宏都拉斯是早期電動汽車充電市場，商業落地取決於保守選址、公用事業容量確認、接口確認和本地服務準備。中國國內規模有採購價值，但不是合規捷徑。
